_meta.description: Depth-agnostic common fixtures. No context field -- matches any integration.

fixtures._comment: Generic greeting — shared across all integrations. Narrowed userMessage from bare 'hello' (substring match) to 'hello world' so it no longer shadows D6 pills whose prompts contain 'hello' as a substring (e.g. langgraph-python headless-simple sends 'Say hello in one short sentence.'). 'hello world' is not used by any current demo pill, so the fixture is effectively a structural placeholder that still serves as a manual-typing fallback.

response.content: Hello! How can I help you today?
